basic_details.job_title: DLSA Kokrajhar Driver Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Legal Services Authority Kokrajhar (DLSA Kokrajhar)
basic_details.short_information: District Legal Services Authority Kokrajhar (DLSA Kokrajhar) Driver Notification 2026 has been released on 22 May 2026 on the official website of DLSA Kokrajhar. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DLSA Kokrajhar Driver Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years In appropriate cases, relaxation of age will be admissible as per the existing rules of Government of Assam.

qualification.education_qualification: Class VIII standard (passed), Valid professional driving license, Minimum three years experience in professional driving
qualification.details: The candidates must possess the minimum educational qualification of Class VIII standard (passed). Must possess a valid professional driving license. Must have minimum three years experience in professional driving.

salary_details.details: Rs. 15,000/- (Rupees Fifteen thousand) only per month.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Kokrajhar Driver Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DLSA Kokrajhar Driver recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications for the DLSA Kokrajhar Driver recruitment is 08-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches the authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Driver post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed at least Class VIII standard. Additionally, a valid professional driving license and a minimum of three years of experience in professional driving are mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Driver position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Driver post is between 18 years and 40 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per the Government of Assam's rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Driver post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Driver post will receive a salary of Rs. 15,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Driver post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Driver post in the District Legal Services Authority Kokrajhar.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Driver role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Skill Test (Driving Test) followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the DLSA Kokrajhar Driver recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates as mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of DLSA Kokrajhar. Links are provided in the 'Important Links' section.
